text.title: Brainstorming Techniques Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-technique
step.action: Pick Classic for 4-8 extroverts and broad problems; 6-3-5 for written teams needing 100+ ideas; Round Robin for dominance risk; Reverse for risk-surfacing.
step.decision-gate: If group has a senior dominant speaker, never pick Classic.

step.name: build-session-plan
step.action: Output session_plan JSON: phases, durations, quantity_target, materials. Include Osborn's 4 rules as a visible cue.

step.name: run-generation
step.action: Execute generation phase. Enforce no-evaluation rule. Time-box strictly.
step.decision-gate: If quantity target missed by 30%+, add 5 min and re-prompt.

step.name: dedup-cluster-score
step.action: Group duplicates; cluster into 3-7 themes; score top items on impact × effort (1-5).

step.name: validate-and-handoff
step.action: Run `validate-brainstorming-techniques.py`. Hand off to product/PM owner with cluster summaries.
